gates.name: Dedup
gates.short_desc: Content-aware duplicate detection catches repeat stories before they publish
gates.wb_desc: Three-layer dedup: same source URL (instant reject), title similarity above 75% via SequenceMatcher, and topic/entity overlap within 14-day window. Keeps the best version of each story.

gates.name: Freshness
gates.short_desc: Rejects stale content older than 90 days to keep the feed current

gates.name: Source
gates.short_desc: Verifies every article has a real, reachable source URL
gates.wb_desc: Validates that each article links to a live, reachable URL. Reader-submitted tips bypass this gate. HTTP status must be 2xx or 3xx.

gates.name: Tip Screening
gates.short_desc: Reader tips are checked for editorial validity and Shoemaker alignment

gates.name: Interest
gates.short_desc: AI scores each story 1–10 on newsworthiness; must score 7+ to pass
gates.wb_desc: GPT-4o scores each article 1-10 on newsworthiness for the mold-affected community. Factors: severity, novelty, community impact, and scientific rigor. Only 7+ articles advance.

gates.name: Headline
gates.short_desc: Rewrites titles for clarity and reader engagement
gates.wb_desc: Rewrites each article headline for clarity, accuracy, and engagement while preserving the factual core. Uses AP style guidance and avoids sensationalism.

gates.name: Rewrite
gates.short_desc: Rewrites each summary in Mold Report voice, adding expert context
gates.wb_desc: Rewrites each article's summary in the Mold Report's editorial voice: neutral, informative, and empowering. Adds Shoemaker Protocol context for research articles, hedges uncertain claims, and includes prevalence data.

gates.name: Compliance
gates.short_desc: Checks and auto-corrects against MoldCo claims compliance rules
gates.wb_desc: Scans for prohibited medical claims, treatment promises, and diagnostic language that violates MoldCo's compliance framework. Auto-corrects with approved alternatives.

gates.name: Research
gates.short_desc: Verifies Shoemaker alignment and scientific accuracy for research articles
gates.wb_desc: For research-category articles, verifies alignment with Shoemaker Protocol science. Cross-references claims against known CIRS biomarkers and peer-reviewed literature.

gates.name: Invention Guard
gates.short_desc: AI cross-checks for fabricated facts and hallucinated claims

gates.name: Photo
gates.short_desc: Assigns images: OG source → topic Unsplash → category fallback
gates.wb_desc: Three-tier image sourcing: first tries the original article's og:image, then searches Unsplash for topic-specific keywords, then falls back to category-themed gradient placeholders.

static_wb_cards.title: Model
static_wb_cards.desc: Claude Sonnet 4 (claude-sonnet-4-20250514) via Anthropic API. Separate agent instances for editorial, compliance, research, invention checking, and duplicate detection.

static_wb_cards.title: Source Bias
static_wb_cards.desc: Weighted toward peer-reviewed journals, government agencies (EPA, CDC), and established news organizations. We deprioritize press releases, affiliate content, and social media.

static_wb_cards.title: Research Framework
static_wb_cards.desc: Aligned with the Shoemaker Protocol research framework. Biomarker references prioritize TGF-B1, MMP-9, MSH, C4a, VIP. This is a known bias. We believe it's the most evidence-backed framework available.

static_wb_cards.title: Editorial Voice
static_wb_cards.desc: Neutral, data-driven, journalistic. No em dashes. No alarmist language. No promotional framing. Lead with facts, end with context. 150-250 words per summary.

static_wb_cards.title: Known Limitations
static_wb_cards.desc: AI cannot verify paywalled sources. Cannot access real-time lab data. Cannot interview human subjects. Cannot detect subtle p-hacking in cited studies. We acknowledge these limits openly.

version_log.title: Duplicate Detection Agent
version_log.desc: New Gate 0 in pipeline: content-aware dedup with three detection layers — same URL (instant reject), title similarity above 75% via SequenceMatcher, and topic/entity overlap within 14-day window. Removed 14 duplicate articles from seed database. Also upgraded photo agent with topic-specific Unsplash matching and visually verified all fallback images.

version_log.title: Full Auto-Publish Pipeline
version_log.desc: Fully autonomous pipeline: RSS fetch → 7-gate AI review → auto-publish. No human step. Added PubMed, EPA/CDC/HUD feeds, reader tip intake, and invention guard.

version_log.title: Claims Compliance + Research Gate
version_log.desc: Added compliance agent enforcing MoldCo claims rules, research verification agent for Shoemaker alignment, and headline rewriting agent.

version_log.title: Interest Scoring Agent
version_log.desc: Articles now scored 1-10 on newsworthiness. Only 7+ articles publish. Added source verification gate and category-based image fallbacks.

version_log.title: Launch
version_log.desc: Initial launch with seed articles, manual curation, and basic AI rewriting.
